meaning: adj.连接的(尤指字迹),草书的,草书体的n.草书,草书原稿
examples: When was the last time you wrote cursive?
The generic families are serif, sansserif, cursive, fantasy, and monospace.
Young people are swiftly losing cursive, using it only to sign their names or write the odd cheque.
In the fifth grade, students were expected to learn how to write in cursive, in ink.
But educators like McGrann feel cursive is more than a traditional style of writing.
